tagline: Pool Service, Cleaning, Equipment Repair and Installation

hero.headline: San Antonio Pool Care Done Right
hero.subheadline: Stop overpaying for repairs you don't need. Pooltastic has spent 15 years earning San Antonio's trust with honest diagnostics, expert service, and crews who treat your pool like their own. You relax -- we handle the rest.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> a Team You Can Trust
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to complex equipment repairs, Pooltastic handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can enjoy your backyard without the headaches.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough skimming, vacuuming, brushing, and chemical balancing every week. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, lights, and cleaners -- we diagnose honestly and fix it right. We find the real problem so you don't pay for parts you don't need.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of pumps, filters, lighting, and automation systems. TICL licensed for all electrical pool work in Texas.

cards.title: Scheduled Maintenance
cards.description: Custom maintenance programs that keep equipment running efficiently and water chemistry perfectly balanced season after season.

cards.title: Pool Light Service
cards.description: Expert pool light repair and replacement by TICL-licensed technicians. Safe, code-compliant electrical work you can count on.

cards.title: Emergency Repairs
cards.description: Storm damage, freeze damage, or sudden equipment failure -- call Pooltastic for fast, reliable emergency pool repair across the San Antonio area.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Message Us
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. Stephanie will get back to you quickly with honest answers and a no-pressure quote -- no upselling, ever.

steps.title: We Diagnose & Deliver
steps.description: Our experienced technicians arrive on schedule, assess your pool honestly, and handle everything from cleaning to complex repairs. No unnecessary replacements.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays clean, your equipment runs right, and you keep more money in your pocket. That's the Pooltastic difference -- honest service that saves you money.

about.label: Why San Antonio Trusts Pooltastic
about.headline: Honest Diagnostics That Save You Real Money
about.description: Founded in 2011 by Jason, Pooltastic has spent over 15 years building a reputation on one simple principle: tell the truth. While other companies push expensive replacements, we find the actual problem -- whether it's a $20 wiring fix or a loose connection after a storm. Our team serves San Antonio, Boerne, Bulverde, Canyon Lake, and 5 more surrounding communities with the same care we'd give our own pools.

features.title: Honest Diagnostics, Real Savings
features.description: We identify the actual issue before recommending repairs. Our customers routinely save thousands because we fix what's broken -- not replace what isn't.

features.title: Locally Owned Since 2011
features.description: Jason and Stephanie run this business personally. You're not a ticket number -- you're a neighbor. Every call gets answered, every concern gets addressed.

features.title: Licensed for Electrical Work
features.description: TICL 476 licensed and regulated by the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation. Pool lights, wiring, and electrical repairs done safely and to code.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a clear quote upfront. We tell you exactly what needs fixing and what it costs -- no hidden fees, no padded invoices.

guarantee.headline: Our "Honest Service" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We will never recommend a replacement when a repair will do. If we diagnose your equipment, we'll explain exactly what's wrong and give you options -- not pressure. If you're not satisfied with any service, we'll make it right. That's the Pooltastic promise, backed by 15 years of doing business the right way.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are on the schedule within a few days. Call or text Stephanie and she'll find a day that works for your area -- we serve San Antonio plus 8 surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Will you try to upsell me on equipment I don't need?
faqs.answer: Never. That's our whole thing. We diagnose honestly and tell you exactly what's wrong. If it's a $20 fix, we'll tell you it's a $20 fix -- even if selling you a new pump would make us more money.

faqs.question: Are you licensed for electrical pool work?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pooltastic holds a TICL 476 license and is regulated by the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation. All pool electrical work -- lights, wiring, connections -- is done safely and to code.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve San Antonio, Boerne, Bulverde, Canyon Lake, Fair Oaks, La Vernia, New Braunfels, Seguin, and Spring Branch. If you're in the greater San Antonio area, chances are we cover you.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most customers provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll always know what was done and how your pool looks after each visit.

testimonials.name: Kirsten F.
testimonials.text: Saved us thousands of dollars! Jason and Stephanie are AMAZING! They found a simple wiring issue after storms when another company wanted to replace our entire pump. Honest people who actually care.

testimonials.name: Benjamin B.
testimonials.text: Stephanie and Jason are the best duo when it comes to taking care of pools. They've handled freeze damage, pump replacements, and even got our pool light fixed before July 4th. Always reliable.

testimonials.name: Larry D.
testimonials.text: Stephanie walked me through fixing a pool issue over the phone -- at no charge. She was so kind and professional that I will never call another pool repair company. Pooltastic has a customer for life.

contact.headline:
Ready for Honest
Pool Service?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from a team that's been doing it right in San Antonio since 2011. No contracts, no upselling -- just straight talk and great pool care.
